the game play loop with Gmurphy usually go something like this:
waltz + hymm to stack tentacle damage turn 1, rouse her if possible   -> swap to white stance at the end
turn 2: if you have not rouse her, rouse her this turn, then use an lemurian exalt(preferably a non damage buffing one, like faros or myriam exalt) to gain shield and tank damage
turn 3: swap to red stance, burst with all your exalt and waltz
And heck, if you have other damage systems, you can hold gmurphy longer

get level 1 for everyone -> level your main DPS -> level the awakener with most stat

For Covenants, you ideally want

Mouchette - Crimson Pulse
Thais - Life Drain
Helot - Burial Ground's Sighs
Aigis - Burial Ground's Sighs
